recent.statement: WTI Crude Oil price will rise by at least 2% in the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: The current snapshot S11 shows WTI Crude Oil up +3.91%, exceeding the 2% threshold.

recent.statement: A tropical storm will make landfall in East Pacific within the next week
recent.evidence: The signals show East Pacific storms (Fausto, Elida) existing offshore with zero affected population, but no signal indicates any tropical storm actually made landfall.

recent.statement: The price of CL=F will increase by at least 1% within the next 24 hours.
recent.evidence: The [now] snapshot S11 shows WTI (CL=F) at 88.23 $/bbl up +3.91%, exceeding the 1% increase threshold.

recent.statement: A tropical cyclone will make landfall in the Philippines
recent.evidence: The only cyclone signals (Bertha, Fausto, Elida) are located in the Atlantic and eastern Pacific with zero population affected, and none show a landfall in the Philippines.

recent.statement: The Strait of Hormuz will experience a significant oil price spike due to increased tensions between the US and Iran within the next week.
recent.evidence: Oil shows only modest ~5% gains (S12/S14) with no signal indicating a significant spike attributable to US-Iran tensions, and no signal references such tensions.

recent.statement: CL=F will rise by 2.5% in the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: No signal reports CL=F price data; all signals concern ship transit counts, so the claimed 2.5% oil price rise is not shown.

recent.statement: A magnitude 6.5 earthquake will occur in the South Sandwich Islands
recent.evidence: No captured signal reports a magnitude 6.5 earthquake in the South Sandwich Islands, an event that would certainly have been recorded within the closed window.

recent.statement: A severe thunderstorm warning will be issued for the Nashville, TN area on July 22
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a severe thunderstorm warning for Nashville would certainly have been captured within the closed window.

recent.statement: The US will impose further sanctions on Iran within the next week
recent.evidence: No captured signal shows the US imposing further sanctions on Iran during the window, and such an action would certainly have been recorded.

recent.statement: A tropical cyclone will make landfall in Vietnam, causing widespread flooding and damage
recent.evidence: The only cyclone signals (BERTHA-26, FAUSTO-26, ELIDA-26) are located far from Vietnam with zero population affected, and no signal shows a tropical cyclone making landfall in Vietnam causing flooding or damage.

recent.statement: A flash flood warning will be issued for the Midwest region in the next 24 hours.
recent.evidence: No numbered signal provides any evidence of a flash flood warning issued for the Midwest during the window, so the event cannot be confirmed.

recent.statement: A major earthquake will strike the South Sandwich Islands region
recent.evidence: No admissible signal shows a major earthquake striking the South Sandwich Islands during the window, and an event that large would have been captured.

self_calibration.note: Published headline probability is RAW conviction (unchanged); this is the honest companion. Calibration fixes overconfidence, not discrimination — see /calibration.
